# Code RED source/decompiled export
# Source: docs/code-red-script-workflow/SCRIPT_FEATURE_STATUS.md
# SHA1: e014ca12520fae42abd1b267ecb40f2b6da7c7f0

# Code RED Script Feature Status

This file tracks script/menu features by proof level.

Legend:

- `research`: idea or observed behavior only
- `verified-native`: native/wrapper/signature evidence found
- `compile-proof`: tiny compile proof passed
- `runtime-proof`: tiny runtime proof passed
- `menu-ready`: safe to wire into the real menu
- `blocked`: do not use until evidence changes

## Current feature matrix

| Feature | Lane | Status | Evidence needed next | Notes |
|---|---|---:|---|---|
| Show player coordinates | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified coordinate read wrapper/native | First safe debug feature. |
| Save current location slot | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | coordinate read proof + file/log proof | Needed before actor travel. |
| Select nearest actor | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified actor scan/handle wrapper/native | Must log selected handle and model/name if available. |
| Teleport selected actor to saved location | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | actor handle + coordinate set proof | Safer first step than pathing. |
| Command selected actor to travel to location | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified task/go-to/pathing wrapper/native | Do not guess task signature. |
| Command selected actor to follow player | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified follow/task wrapper/native | Companion foundation. |
| Command selected actor to guard point | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified guard/task wrapper/native | Useful for posse/defense behavior. |
| Spawn actor from menu | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified spawn wrapper/native + model proof | Add after selection/logging works. |
| Weather/time controls | Trainer / ScriptHook / RedHook | research | verified wrappers/native signatures | Common trainer function, still needs local proof. |
| Full SC-CL menu | SC-CL | blocked | do not continue from old source | Old source used guessed signatures and is untrusted. |
| Tiny SC-CL subtitle proof | SC-CL | compile-proof | hash/document outputs | Keep as minimal proof only. |
| RPF tune patch export | RPF/resource | runtime-proof | continue copied-archive validation | Separate from menu work. |
| WSI/WGD gringo correlation | RPF/resource | research | correlator proof table | Useful for vehicle/world placement, not menu path. |

## Promotion rule

Move a feature forward only after the evidence exists.

Example path:

```text
research -> verified-native -> compile-proof or runtime-proof -> menu-ready
```

A feature can skip compile-proof if it is a live trainer/runtime feature and runtime proof is stronger than compile proof.

## Regression rule

If a menu feature crashes, corrupts state, or needs guessed signatures, move it back to `blocked` or `research`.
